speaker: speaker1
text: I have to get to Chicago by tomorrow and you're telling me that there are no flights ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm very sorry , sir . I could put you on a waiting list , but you would be wise to check out other means of travel .

speaker: speaker1
text: You mean like a bus ? Have you ever traveled for ten hours on a bus before ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I have not sir . But I do have a number for a very comfortable bus that goes to Chicago every hour from here .

speaker: speaker1
text: Alright , give me the number . But put me on that waiting list as well .

speaker: speaker2
text: Here is the number , and your name is on the waiting list .

speaker: speaker1
text: How many people are on the waiting list right now ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Right now I show that there are 176 people on the list . And you are number 176 .
